universeInfo.label: 49 industries + Treasuries (+ cash)
universeInfo.description: Forty-nine industry portfolios, plus U.S. Treasuries at 2Y/5Y/10Y. Dynamic strategies may also leave residual wealth in cash, so the effective investable set includes a cash sleeve.

specInfo.shortLabel: PLS · (portfolio returns + FF5 factors + macro/curve inputs) · H6 · k=2
specInfo.description: PLS-based factor-zoo candidate; with horizon H=6; and k=2 latent components; using portfolio returns, FF5 factors, macro/curve inputs.
